title: Inception
description: A skilled thief is given a chance at redemption if he can successfully perform an inception — planting an idea in someone's mind.

title: Interstellar
description: A team of explorers travel through a wormhole in space in an attempt to ensure humanity's survival.

title: The Dark Knight
description: Batman faces the Joker, a criminal mastermind who wants to plunge Gotham City into anarchy.

title: Oppenheimer
description: The story of American scientist J. Robert Oppenheimer and his role in the development of the atomic bomb.

title: Money Heist
description: A criminal mastermind recruits eight thieves to carry out an ambitious heist on the Royal Mint of Spain.

title: Breaking Bad
description: A high school chemistry teacher turned methamphetamine manufacturer partners with a former student.

title: Stranger Things
description: When a boy disappears, his friends and family uncover a secret involving supernatural forces and government experiments.

title: Peaky Blinders
description: A gangster family epic set in 1900s England, centering on the Shelby crime family.

title: Avengers: Endgame
description: After the devastating events of Infinity War, the Avengers assemble once more to reverse Thanos's actions.

title: Game of Thrones
description: Nine noble families fight for control over the mythical lands of Westeros while an ancient enemy returns.

title: Spider-Man: Across the Spider-Verse
description: Miles Morales catapults across the Multiverse, where he encounters a team of Spider-People.

title: Your Name
description: Two strangers find themselves linked in a bizarre way, swapping bodies and falling in love.

title: Attack on Titan
description: Humanity fights for survival against giant humanoid creatures called Titans behind enormous walls.

title: Demon Slayer
description: A young boy becomes a demon slayer after his family is slaughtered and his sister is turned into a demon.

title: One Piece
description: Monkey D. Luffy sets off on an adventure to find the legendary treasure One Piece and become King of the Pirates.
